name: Zendikar

draft.notes: Pack is 10 commons, 3 uncommons, a rare, an ad card, and a basic land (always full-art). If a foil appears it follows the land, displacing a common.

sourceNotes: Large set. Printed in USA and Belgium. 36 packs per box. Some packs contained 'Priceless Treasures' (real reacquired old cards inserted as a bonus) — not modelled. Basic lands are always the full-art versions. Booster has both a basic land and an ad card.
